user.title: Smart Toilet BLE - Model Selection
user.description:
Select your toilet model. This determines the BLE protocol and commands used.

Found {model_count} supported models.

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Found {device_count} BLE device(s). Select your toilet or enter MAC manually.

manual.title: Manual MAC Address Entry
manual.description:
Enter your toilet's MAC address manually.

Find it via:
1. nRF Connect app (scan BLE devices)
2. Original control app
3. bluetoothctl on Home Assistant

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
